title: Ichtyoselmis macrantha
taxonomy: Ichtyoselmis macrantha belongs to the class Chlorophyceae, which is a division of green algae. This classification places it within the broader kingdom of Chlorophyta. Within the class Chlorophyceae, Ichtyoselmis macrantha is further classified as a member of the order Tetrasporales. The family to which it belongs is Tetrasporaceae, and it is one of several genera within this family. The exact genus classification of Ichtyoselmis macrantha is a bit more nuanced and may require further research.
